description: LineSeparator gains a public method, so the Java ABI moves and every Kotlin source in the module is recompiled (the conservative path - see IncrementalCompiler.kotlinFilesToCompile). Adding a method cannot change any caller's bytecode, so the recompiled SET stays small; what this edit measures is the wall-clock cost of that conservatism on a 73-Kotlin-file module, against edit 01's fast path.
